_publications._publicationTitle: Neuroanatomical correlates of working memory performance in Neurofibromatosis 1.

_contextSnippet: The working memory variables were subjected to a varimax rotated PCA, which produced 3 independent factors with eigenvalue > 1, which accounted for 54% of total variance
details: Working memory variables from n-back task were subjected to varimax rotated PCA, producing 3 independent factors with eigenvalue > 1, accounting for 54% of total variance. High working memory load (verbal and visuospatial 2-back and 3-back accuracy) loaded onto factor 1, low working memory load (verbal and visuospatial 0-back and 1-back accuracy) loaded onto factor 2
